name: DFA: Strings ending with 'ab'
description: Accepts all strings over {a,b} that end with 'ab'.

name: NFA: Contains 'aba'
description: Accepts strings over {a,b} that contain the substring 'aba'.

name: ε-NFA: a*b* via epsilon
description: Accepts a*b* using epsilon transitions between the a-part and the b-part.

name: DPDA: Balanced parentheses
description: Accepts strings of balanced parentheses using a stack.

name: DTM: Binary string equality
description: Checks if a binary string before '#' matches the one after '#' symbol by symbol.
